title: Ransomware Attack Investigation - Finance Workstation Cluster
executive_summary: Finance workstations show a coordinated ransomware sequence: backup disruption, shadow copy deletion, suspicious executable activity, mass encryption, and ransom note deployment.
forensic_conclusion: Evidence supports a critical ransomware incident requiring containment, host imaging, log preservation, and recovery validation.
key_findings: Shadow copy deletion and backup-service disruption
Ransom note and payment indicator present
